title: E-commerce Store for Mobile Case Hub
summary: Designed and built an e-commerce store from the ground up — smooth across devices, fast checkout, and a catalog built to scale.

title: On-Demand Garden Care App for Plantropan
summary: Mantravi built Plantropan, an on-demand garden care platform where urban residents book trusted professional gardeners. We delivered a modern Flutter app, hardened the Java backend, and eliminated payment lag, memory leaks, and database bottlenecks that were breaking the booking journey.
challenge: Plantropan was connecting customers with gardeners at scale, but production friction showed up in the worst places: slow payment verification, memory leaks during booking, and database load that made the app feel unreliable when users needed it most.
solution: End-to-end rebuild and stabilization with Flutter for the mobile experience and Java for scheduling, payments, and user management. Async processing, API caching, and query optimization removed backend drag while a refreshed UI turned a complex flow into something users could finish in minutes.
highlights: Flutter app for discovery, booking, and job tracking on iOS and Android
Java backend for scheduling, accounts, and transactional integrity
Async payment verification and API caching on critical paths
Memory leak fixes and database optimization under concurrent load
Modern animations and accessible UI across the booking funnel

title: Luxury Jewelry Digital Showroom for DP Jewellers
summary: Mantravi digitized the DP Jewellers showroom with a premium React Native app for iOS and Android, a Next.js admin control center for inventory and analytics, and Firebase infrastructure that keeps high-value jewelry catalogs in real-time sync across store and mobile.
challenge: DP Jewellers needed more than a standard retail app. The digital experience had to match the trust, elegance, and visual impact of a luxury jewelry showroom, while giving the team a secure admin backbone to manage high-value inventory without developer bottlenecks.
solution: A full digital showroom ecosystem: React Native mobile with minimalist, photography-led UX; a Next.js admin panel for stock, collections, and analytics; and Firebase for real-time sync, secure authentication, and high-resolution product imagery.
highlights: Premium React Native app for iOS and Android from one codebase
Next.js admin for real-time stock, collections, and analytics
Firebase sync between showroom updates and the consumer app
High-resolution imagery pipeline tuned for mobile performance
Minimalist UX that puts craftsmanship and trust first

title: Kidswear Brand Storefront for Ameyru
summary: Brand and storefront experience for a kidswear label — trustworthy to parents, easy to shop, and tuned for performance.

title: AI Tech Intelligence App for Vedlik
summary: Mantravi built Vedlik, a free AI and tech intelligence app for iOS and Android that turns noisy headlines into structured 4-Point Insights, flip-card signals, and a personal Intel Library for developers, founders, and students.
challenge: AI and startup news is fast-moving and full of fluff. Vedlik needed a mobile product that delivers facts, market context, builder angles, and big-picture takeaways without feeling like another social feed.
solution: End-to-end product engineering with Flutter, Firestore, Python, and integrated LLMs: structured insights, contextual glossary, anti-fluff feed, Intel Library, and a marketing site aligned with the product narrative.
highlights: 3 Point Insight format on every story
3D Intelligence Flip for funding and technical signals
Free core experience with source attribution

title: How to Choose the Right Tech Stack for Your Product in 2026
excerpt: A practical guide to picking frameworks and infrastructure that match your timeline, team, and growth plans.
